Ihara,

This patch is the second of two patches on top of Shilong's unaligned readahead support.  If you get a chance, could you try this for i/o 500 hard read?

Patch Set 1:

Also, could you maybe collect osc.*.rpc_stats and read_ahead_stats for a few clients?  If possible, with Shilong's & with these two extra patches.  I am seeing some slightly weird misses and I am not sure if my patches introduced them.

parents.subject: LU-12043 llite: extend readahead locks for striped file

commit.subject: LU-12533 llite: Improve readahead RPC issuance
commit.message:
LU-12533 llite: Improve readahead RPC issuance

lov_io_submit receives a range of pages, then adds pages in
to a batch until it hits a page which is not in the stripe
associated with this lov object.  This means that if a
readahead page range hits the same stripe more than once,
we will issue multiple I/Os, even if the pages would fit in
one RPC.

This is unnecessary - Just submit all these pages at once.

mpirun -n 2 $IOR -s 2000 -t 47K -b 47K -k -r -E -o $FILE
